TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: basketball nu Amuhuwan a sasakama, lanciw nu Sakizaya a kamu. kakiliman a mimali tu lanciw a tusaay ku kabut milabu sa, anu mimali kina lanciwan u tanayaay a sapimali, anu tahkal mimali lima aca ku tademaw mimali, kina mali taneng misaliwliw tatacuwa a mipakah mimali atu kulukulud atu mikili tu mali, kian mali kanca a mitemec tu tumaan amimaliay, anu mimali tu matatemec mipuluh tu tumaay a mimaliay, kya makaala tu sapitemec. kina lanciw i kitaki u sakaydihan nu katuuday mimali kuynian, nama 1936 a mihcaan malingatu aoyunhui malalucek a mitademecay a mammalian, i tini pakatuluay a hun nu ulic makawait tu mali tusaay ku nikaalaan tu nikatemecan, anu i tuluay nu hun a ulic miwait tuluay ku nikawaitan a nikaalaan. anu mamin matademec sa, anu cima ku sayadahay ani waitan wyda ku kata, anu malecad ku nikaalaan sa misatanayu aca midademec, anu mimali hen, u mimaliay taneng matulin mimali (hayni pimali i lalad, pasayni i udip nu lima sa) kya malingatu madupa a mipapeli i dumaan a tademaw, anu papeli i dumaan a mimaliyay, anu muculil (ya mimaliay sa, anu caay pimali muculil aca tu mipimaliay kina kakawawan), anu pelihen ku mali atu kina tusa mimali sa patelacay kuynian. nilacul
S.PHON: bask…ôtbar~…ĺr~…ĺ nu amuńßuwan a sasakama, r~…ĺan ¶iw nu sakizaja a kamu. kakir~…ĺiman a mimar~…ĺi tu r~…ĺan ¶iw a tusaaj ku kabut mir~…ĺabu sa, anu mimar~…ĺi kina r~…ĺan ¶iwan u tanajaaj a sapimar~…ĺi, anu tańßkar~…ĺ mimar~…ĺi r~…ĺima a ¶a ku tad…ômaw mimar~…ĺi, kina mar~…ĺi tan…ôŇč misar~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw tata ¶uwa a mipakańß mimar~…ĺi atu kur~…ĺukur~…ĺud atu mikir~…ĺi tu mar~…ĺi, kian mar~…ĺi kan ¶a a mit…ôm…ô ¶ tu tumaan amimar~…ĺiaj, anu mimar~…ĺi tu matat…ôm…ô ¶ mipur~…ĺuńß tu tumaaj a mimar~…ĺiaj, kja makaar~…ĺa tu sapit…ôm…ô ¶. kina r~…ĺan ¶iw i kitaki u sakajdińßan nu katuudaj mimar~…ĺi kujnian, nama **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu aojunńßui mar~…ĺar~…ĺu ¶…ôk a mitad…ôm…ô ¶aj a mammar~…ĺian, i tini pakatur~…ĺuaj a ńßun nu ur~…ĺi ¶ makawait tu mar~…ĺi tusaaj ku nikaar~…ĺaan tu nikat…ôm…ô ¶an, anu i tur~…ĺuaj nu ńßun a ur~…ĺi ¶ miwait tur~…ĺuaj ku nikawaitan a nikaar~…ĺaan. anu mamin matad…ôm…ô ¶ sa, anu ¶ima ku sajadańßaj ani waitan wjda ku kata, anu mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku nikaar~…ĺaan sa misatanaju a ¶a midad…ôm…ô ¶, anu mimar~…ĺi ńß…ôn, u mimar~…ĺiaj tan…ôŇč matur~…ĺin mimar~…ĺi (ńßajni pimar~…ĺi i r~…ĺar~…ĺad, pasajni i udip nu r~…ĺima sa) kja mar~…ĺiŇčatu madupa a mipap…ôr~…ĺi i dumaan a tad…ômaw, anu pap…ôr~…ĺi i dumaan a mimar~…ĺijaj, anu mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ (ja mimar~…ĺiaj sa, anu ¶aaj pimar~…ĺi mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ a ¶a tu mipimar~…ĺiaj kina kakawawan), anu p…ôr~…ĺińß…ôn ku mar~…ĺi atu kina tusa mimar~…ĺi sa pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj kujnian. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ
S.FORM: basketball nu Amuhuwan a sasakama, lanciw nu Sakizaya a kamu. kakiliman a mimali tu lanciw a tusaay ku kabut milabu sa, anu mimali kina lanciwan u tanayaay a sapimali, anu tahkal mimali lima aca ku tademaw mimali, kina mali taneng misaliwliw tatacuwa a mipakah mimali atu kulukulud atu mikili tu mali, kian mali kanca a mitemec tu tumaan amimaliay, anu mimali tu matatemec mipuluh tu tumaay a mimaliay, kya makaala tu sapitemec. kina lanciw i kitaki u sakaydihan nu katuuday mimali kuynian, nama 1936 a mihcaan malingatu aoyunhui malalucek a mitademecay a mammalian, i tini pakatuluay a hun nu ulic makawait tu mali tusaay ku nikaalaan tu nikatemecan, anu i tuluay nu hun a ulic miwait tuluay ku nikawaitan a nikaalaan. anu mamin matademec sa, anu cima ku sayadahay ani waitan wyda ku kata, anu malecad ku nikaalaan sa misatanayu aca midademec, anu mimali hen, u mimaliay taneng matulin mimali (hayni pimali i lalad, pasayni i udip nu lima sa) kya malingatu madupa a mipapeli i dumaan a tademaw, anu papeli i dumaan a mimaliyay, anu muculil (ya mimaliay sa, anu caay pimali muculil aca tu mipimaliay kina kakawawan), anu pelihen ku mali atu kina tusa mimali sa patelacay kuynian. nilacul
S.PHON: bask…ôtbar~…ĺr~…ĺ nu amuńßuwan a sasakama, r~…ĺan ¶iw nu sakizaja a kamu. kakir~…ĺiman a mimar~…ĺi tu r~…ĺan ¶iw a tusaaj ku kabut mir~…ĺabu sa, anu mimar~…ĺi kina r~…ĺan ¶iwan u tanajaaj a sapimar~…ĺi, anu tańßkar~…ĺ mimar~…ĺi r~…ĺima a ¶a ku tad…ômaw mimar~…ĺi, kina mar~…ĺi tan…ôŇč misar~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw tata ¶uwa a mipakańß mimar~…ĺi atu kur~…ĺukur~…ĺud atu mikir~…ĺi tu mar~…ĺi, kian mar~…ĺi kan ¶a a mit…ôm…ô ¶ tu tumaan amimar~…ĺiaj, anu mimar~…ĺi tu matat…ôm…ô ¶ mipur~…ĺuńß tu tumaaj a mimar~…ĺiaj, kja makaar~…ĺa tu sapit…ôm…ô ¶. kina r~…ĺan ¶iw i kitaki u sakajdińßan nu katuudaj mimar~…ĺi kujnian, nama **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu aojunńßui mar~…ĺar~…ĺu ¶…ôk a mitad…ôm…ô ¶aj a mammar~…ĺian, i tini pakatur~…ĺuaj a ńßun nu ur~…ĺi ¶ makawait tu mar~…ĺi tusaaj ku nikaar~…ĺaan tu nikat…ôm…ô ¶an, anu i tur~…ĺuaj nu ńßun a ur~…ĺi ¶ miwait tur~…ĺuaj ku nikawaitan a nikaar~…ĺaan. anu mamin matad…ôm…ô ¶ sa, anu ¶ima ku sajadańßaj ani waitan wjda ku kata, anu mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku nikaar~…ĺaan sa misatanaju a ¶a midad…ôm…ô ¶, anu mimar~…ĺi ńß…ôn, u mimar~…ĺiaj tan…ôŇč matur~…ĺin mimar~…ĺi (ńßajni pimar~…ĺi i r~…ĺar~…ĺad, pasajni i udip nu r~…ĺima sa) kja mar~…ĺiŇčatu madupa a mipap…ôr~…ĺi i dumaan a tad…ômaw, anu pap…ôr~…ĺi i dumaan a mimar~…ĺijaj, anu mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ (ja mimar~…ĺiaj sa, anu ¶aaj pimar~…ĺi mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ a ¶a tu mipimar~…ĺiaj kina kakawawan), anu p…ôr~…ĺińß…ôn ku mar~…ĺi atu kina tusa mimar~…ĺi sa pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj kujnian. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ
